name: Fried Ice Cream4
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop ice cream into 8 balls, using about 1/2 cup per ball. Freeze until firm, about 1 hour.
2. In a shallow dish, combine the crushed corn flakes and cinnamon.
3. In another shallow dish, beat the egg whites until foamy.
4. Roll each ice cream ball in the egg white mixture, then coat completely with the crumb mixture. If needed, roll in the egg white and crumb mixture again to ensure full coverage.
5. Freeze the coated balls until firm, 3 to 4 hours.
6. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy saucepan to 375 degrees. Using a basket or slotted spoon, fry ice cream balls 1 or 2 at a time for 10 to 15 seconds or until golden brown.
7. Drain on paper towels and return the fried balls to the freezer while frying the remaining ones.
8. Serve immediately with whipped cream, honey, and cherries.
Makes 8 servings.
